no: Valerie sorcerer. Character and writing is fine, but it'll probably never get the BG2 continuation that was planned FIXED: tp2 bug — line 22 has broken ternary: (GAME_IS ~tutu tutu_totsc~ ? 1 : 0) should be (GAME_IS ~tutu tutu_totsc~) ? 1 : 0. Missing closing paren before ? causes OUTER_SET to crash, preventing is_bgt from being set. Fails on reinstall with 'cannot convert is_bgt to integer'. Same bug as Isra. Patched in Extracted and game dir.
sum: Adds Valerie as a joinable NPC companion in Baldur's Gate, a new character with her own personality, dialogue, and storyline.

co.n: Valerie NPC Mod for BG1 Tutu, BGT BG:EE and EET
co.tp2n: Valerie NPC Mod for BG1 Tutu, BGT BG:EE and EET
